command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash -s << EOF
echo --- unmask and start ---
sudo systemctl unmask hermes-gateway
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable hermes-gateway
sudo systemctl start hermes-gateway
sleep 15
echo active: $(systemctl is-active hermes-gateway)
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 8080 | head -1
sleep 5
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8810426999:AAFVOYtkbR2NtFV9-OfvkjeogQo4-gK37W0/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; print('url:', r.get('url'), '| error:', repr(r.get('last_error_message')))"
tail -5 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log
EOF
